About Us

Kansas City's Premier Bar & Grill

About Cory Frank's

Kansas City's Neighborhood Bar, Amped Up

A place where game nights feel bigger, live music hits harder, and every visit feels like you’ve got a seat at the table.

Since 2018

Built for KC

A neighborhood staple with the energy of a downtown destination.

Always On

Food, Drinks, Music

The kind of place where there’s always something worth staying for.

Our Vibe

Dark, warm, lively, and unmistakably Kansas City — premium bar comfort with community at the center.

Our Story

Established in 2018, Cory Frank's Bar & Grill was built on a simple idea: create a place where Kansas City could gather, unwind, and make memories. We're not just a bar — we're your neighborhood hangout, your game-day destination, your Friday night live music venue, and your go-to spot for great food and even better company.

From first-time visitors to regulars who know the staff by name, every part of the experience is designed to feel welcoming, energetic, and easy to come back to. We keep the lights low, the drinks cold, the music lively, and the atmosphere rooted in genuine hospitality.

Why people keep coming back

  • Neighborhood energy with a polished, premium feel.
  • Food, drinks, and entertainment under one roof.
  • A community-first space that feels local, not corporate.

What Makes Us Special

From the first pour to the last song of the night, every detail is designed to keep the room buzzing and the community connected.

🍺

Craft Drinks

Signature cocktails, cold beer on tap, and daily specials that keep happy hour fresh.

📺

Sports Bar

10 massive flat-screen TVs mean you can catch every play, every matchup, and every big moment.

🎵

Live Entertainment

Live bands, open jam, and karaoke every week keep the energy high and the nights unforgettable.

🍔

Great Food

Elevated bar food made with quality ingredients, served hot, fast, and always satisfying.

🎯

Weekly Events

Something happening every single night, so there’s always a reason to stop by again.

❤️

Community

Kansas City's gathering place since 2018 — built around familiar faces and unforgettable nights.

Find Us

Swing by for dinner, drinks, the game, or a night out with friends. We’re easy to find and even easier to love.

Address

5410 NE Antioch Rd, Kansas City, MO 64118

Phone

(816) 214-5256

Hours

Monday - Thursday 11:00 AM - 12:00 AM
Friday 11:00 AM - 2:00 AM
Saturday 10:00 AM - 2:00 AM
Sunday 10:00 AM - 12:00 AM
Perfect for lunch, dinner, late-night hangs, watch parties, and live music nights.

Ready to experience Cory Frank's?

Come for the food, stay for the atmosphere, and leave knowing you found your new Kansas City favorite.
